title: 日本ダービーの後に・Der Sieg

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After her win, Eishin Flash can barely contain her
joy. Meanwhile, her parents are over the moon
with her outstanding accomplishment.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Once again, lofty ambitions for victory stir within
her. We agree to continue with her plan to
complete all her scheduled races.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
However, due to a health concern, I decide to
remove the Classic Triple Crown's final race, the
Kikuka Sho, from her schedule.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her perfectly constructed plan is now in ruins.
This new reality throws Eishin Flash's spirit into
chaos.
